// Structure: Conditional
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{
    public static bool Contains(sbyte key)
    {


        switch (key)
        {
            case sbyte.MinValue:
            case -1:
            case 0:
            case 1:
            case sbyte.MaxValue:
                return true;
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }

    public const uint ItemCount = 5;
    public const sbyte MinKey = sbyte.MinValue;
    public const sbyte MaxKey = sbyte.MaxValue;
}
